nodes.name: architecture.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide covering the core architecture of the tinystruct Java framework, including key abstractions (AbstractApplication, ActionRegistry, Action, Context, Dispatcher), the full package map, template dispatch flow, and initialization examples. Intended as lookup material for the tinystruct-patterns skill.

nodes.name: data-handling.md
nodes.summary: Reference for tinystruct's zero-dependency JSON handling via Builder (objects) and Builders (arrays), covering serialization, deserialization, and the rationale for preferring Builders over List<Builder> to avoid type-erasure issues.

nodes.name: database.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for tinystruct's ORM-like persistence layer built on AbstractData and XML mapping files, covering CRUD operations, the Condition fluent query builder, POJO generation via CLI, and mapping XML structure rules.

nodes.name: routing.md
nodes.summary: Reference for tinystruct's @Action annotation routing system, documenting regex generation rules for typed parameters, all Mode values (DEFAULT, CLI, HTTP_GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH), dependency injection of Request/Response, and path-matching priority.

nodes.name: system-usage.md
nodes.summary: Reference for tinystruct runtime system features including Context/CLI argument access, pluggable session management (Memory and Redis), Server-Sent Events via SSEPushManager, file uploads via FileEntity, outbound HTTP via URLRequest/HTTPHandler, and the event dispatcher system.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Reference for JUnit 5 testing patterns in tinystruct applications, covering unit test setup via ActionRegistry singleton initialization, invoke-based action testing, ActionRegistry routing match tests, and HTTP integration testing using the built-in HttpServer with URLRequest/HTTPHandler.
